rule: No Evidence = Not Done; QA + Receipt = Done

stages.title: Setup
stages.responsibility: Prepare Google Sheet schema, Apps Script Processor, connectivity and deployment checks

stages.title: Create Job
stages.responsibility: Convert the Boss command into one goal, scope, priority and acceptance criteria

stages.title: Route Job
stages.responsibility: Route each mission to the correct specialist and prepare parallel execution

stages.title: Evidence Gate
stages.responsibility: Validate output, evidence, acceptance criteria, safety and risk before Done

stages.title: Receipt and Backup
stages.responsibility: Create the receipt, preserve evidence and prepare backup while AGIS approves final closure
